individualAssessments.summary: Pressure trend exceeds the review threshold.
Recent maintenance note may explain part of the change.

consensus: The pressure trend needs operator review before the next run.
partialEvidence: Pressure data is present, but temperature data is not included.

uniqueFindings.finding: Maintenance work-order timing overlaps with the trend change.

blindSpots: No downstream quality measurement is attached.
decisionsNeeded: Decide whether to pause the next run or collect one more measurement cycle.
